text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How could I, of all people, have let this happen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, to be quite honest, I happened to see
something called the Guilt-Free 0 Cal Mont Blanc
at a cafe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I bought it thinking I could eat it without feeling
guilty about breaking my diet, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was so excited, I ended up letting it slip out of
my hands...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... My first Mont Blanc in an entire month...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Indescribable sorrow radiates from Mejiro
McQueen as she walks away.
